positions.title: COURSE COACH
requirements: DFB coaching license or willingness to work towards a license
Mobility, ideally with a driver's license/car
Enjoy working with children and parents
Team spirit, attention to detail and willingness to learn
Solid football skills to demonstrate drills
tasks: Delivering DFS programs (football kindergarten, development training, camp support)
Preparing and delivering trainings (according to the DFS philosophy)
benefits: Flexible employment models: from mini-job to permanent position
Pleasant working atmosphere in a great team

positions.title: CAMP COACH
requirements: Enjoy working with children and parents
Flexibility and availability during school holidays
Team spirit, attention to detail and willingness to learn
Solid football skills to demonstrate drills
tasks: Preparing and conducting training sessions (according to the DFS philosophy)
Supervising children during the camp (no overnight stays)
benefits: Pleasant working atmosphere in a great team
